dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Usage
dashboard.description: Usage and volume visibility based on internal telemetry.

search.query: index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=1d sum(urls_total) as urls_total sum(urls_success) as urls_success sum(urls_failed) as urls_failed

index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | stats sum(urls_total) as urls_total sum(urls_success) as urls_success sum(urls_failed) as urls_failed avg(duration_ms) as avg_duration_ms by stanza | sort - urls_total
